params.prompt: Transform this room image into a cinematic editorial real-estate still. Preserve exact architecture, perspective, walls, windows, door openings, furniture layout, lens realism, and room scale. Maintain believable residential scale for a 7.833 by 8 ft Dine. High natural light from bay-style multi-pane window; highlight woven pendant as the main practical light for evening frames. Keep reflections soft and warm. A calm, family-friendly Japandi interior that balances warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, and layered natural textures. Prioritize a cozy work corner in the bedroom while keeping sightlines clean across the open-plan living, dining, and kitchen. Light is soft and directional from windows; materials focus on light oak, warm walnut accents, hand-glazed ceramics, woven pendants, and tactile textiles. Keep these fixed unless the user explicitly wants transformation: exact architecture room geometry furniture layout lens realism vertical line integrity believable scale light entering from visible sources only VISUAL CONSISTENCY REQUIREMENT (reference image provided): The dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish, oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser, one hand-glazed tan ceramic vase, one small ceramic vase (tan) and linen napkin styling in this room must exactly match the style, materials, and form shown in reference image — treat it as the definitive source of truth for these pieces. The Taste visible through the open kitchen must show exactly the same kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, small ceramic canister group in tan (#B58E61), round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish, visible edge of round light-oak dining table spec (see shared objects), small ceramic canister group in tan (#B58E61) near the sink as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. The Nest visible through the open-plan living area must show exactly the same sofa, coffee table, area rug, low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs, textured wool rug — warm oatmeal (#EDE6DE) with subtle charcoal linear weave (#2F3230), 8x10ft, low pile, low organic coffee table — organic-shaped low coffee table, solid walnut stained warm brown (#8A6E52), matte finish, curved edges, tall potted fiddle-leaf fig — matte terra-cotta pot in muted green (#6A736A), height ~5ft, round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish, oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser, bookshelf as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. add a mini refrigerator — at approximately 91% across and 84% down
